overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 following an NCPD officer through Night City's neon-lit downtown. The character walks through a covered pedestrian arcade with distinctive green spiral architecture, crosses a busy intersection with towering digital billboards, and continues along a sidewalk lined with futuristic white buildings and vibrant teal accent lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian dining arcade with outdoor seating

agents.ego_description: walking through covered pedestrian arcade following an NCPD officer who entered the frame from the left

notable_agents.action: NCPD officer walking steadily ahead of the player through the arcade

entered.detail: Transparent roof structure covering the pedestrian walkway with visible support beams
Distinctive cylindrical building wrapped with horizontal green neon lighting
White patio umbrellas shading tables and chairs along the walkway
Illuminated vending machine displaying advertisements on its screen
Large illuminated commercial signs mounted above the arcade entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered pedestrian arcade with outdoor dining areas on the left. The distinctive green spiral building dominates the left skyline while neon billboards glow above. An NCPD officer walks ahead of the camera through the tiled walkway, passing vending machines and seating areas under the sheltered roof.

scene_state.functional_zone: major urban intersection with towering digital billboards

events.description: exits covered arcade into open intersection revealing massive digital billboards on surrounding skyscrapers
crosses street using yellow zebra crosswalk while vehicles wait at red traffic light

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a crosswalk following the NCPD officer through the intersection

notable_agents.action: black sedan stopped at the traffic light waiting for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: Massive illuminated advertising screens covering the facades of surrounding skyscrapers with bright animations
Modern white building with angular geometric facade and teal accent lighting at the base
Suspended traffic signal showing red light above the intersection

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered arcade, the scene opens into a vast urban intersection surrounded by towering digital billboards illuminating the night. The camera follows the NCPD officer across a yellow zebra crosswalk as a black sedan waits at the red light. The white geometric building with teal lighting stands prominently on the right while the green spiral building recedes to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk with futuristic commercial buildings and neon signage

events.description: turns right to follow the sidewalk alongside the white building, passing the Real Meat restaurant entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk following the NCPD officer through the neon-lit downtown corridor

notable_agents.action: NCPD officer continuing to walk ahead along the sidewalk, maintaining distance from player

entered.detail: Restaurant entrance with illuminated 'REAL MEAT' signage in red neon letters
Elevated walkway or bridge structure spanning across the street ahead
Commercial buildings with bright pink and red neon signage lining the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the sidewalk alongside the white geometric building, now close enough to see the teal accent lighting tracing its base. The camera passes the 'Real Meat' restaurant entrance and continues toward an elevated pedestrian bridge visible in the distance. Neon-lit storefronts glow on the left while vehicles pass on the street, maintaining the dense cyberpunk urban atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered pedestrian arcade into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic city intersection. It begins by trailing an NCPD officer through a covered walkway lined with outdoor dining and vending machines, dominated by a towering green spiral building on the left. As the camera exits the shelter, the scene opens into a vast urban crossing where the officer walks across a yellow zebra crosswalk beneath massive, glowing digital billboards. The perspective then shifts to follow the sidewalk alongside a white geometric building, moving closer to its teal accent lighting and passing a Real Meat restaurant. Finally, the camera continues past glowing storefronts and passing traffic, heading toward an elevated pedestrian bridge in the distance.
